Melbourne Psychology

Speech Pathology

Occupational Therapy

Back On Track Psychology – Unlock your potential, thrive with us.

Reach out to us

Back On Track Psychology Melbourne

was established to provide clients an easy access to quality and timely mental health solutions unique to their individual situation.

More about Us

Compassion

We are here to provide the care and support you need for your emotional wellbeing.

Evidence-based

Our treatment approach is based on scientific evidence.

Personalised treatment

All of our sessions are personalized according to your background, your need, your narrative and your values.

Our Services

Back On Track Psychology

offer a comprehensive range of professional psychological assessments and therapy services, including cognitive, educational, and clinical evaluations for children and adults. Our evidence-based, personalized approach is designed to support your mental well-being and personal development.

We were inspired to provide quality mental health services to the wider community, including the cultural and linguistically diverse individuals. We are committed to provide psychology service using the language that you are comfortable with.

 

Assessment + Therapy

Psychology / Neuropsychology Melbourne +

Occupational Therapy Melbourne +

Contact us to make an booking

Our Team

Back On Track Psychology

We are a Melbourne psychology clinic that inspired to provide quality mental health services to the wider community, including the cultural and linguistically diverse individuals.

Meet our team

Address: 97 Cotham Rd, Kew 3101
Tel: 03 9021 9368
Fax: 03 9012 7907
email: admin@backontrackpsych.com

Back On Track Psychology does not have capacity to provide emergency services.
If you need support urgently, please call 000. Links to other helpful services can be found here.
